summary: Found one medium-confidence regression in the native `/codex` conversation-control path: the commit isolates Codex app-server `HOME`/`CODEX_HOME` per agent, but `/codex bind` and `/codex resume` still start the app-server without forwarding the configured default OpenAI Codex auth profile.

actions.reason: ClawSweeper found an actionable commit-level bug/regression candidate.

fix_actions.reason: Codex /review did not pass after 2 attempt(s): Merge is blocked by one incomplete repair. The branch is narrow and `pnpm check:changed` plus `git diff --check` passed, but the implemented auth selection only handles the literal `openai-codex:default` profile and still misses configured default/order-based Codex auth profiles.
